info.name: Judger AI API
info.description:
Complete REST API for Judger AI — a legal-tech assistant for lawyers, individuals, law students, and law firms.

**Setup:**
1. Set `base_url` variable to your server URL (e.g. `http://localhost/amir/public`)
2. Call **Login** — the token is saved automatically to `auth_token`
3. All protected endpoints use `{{auth_token}}` via Bearer Auth

**Legal Disclaimer:** All AI outputs are informational drafts requiring review by a qualified lawyer.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Ahmed Al-Hassan",
  "email": "ahmed@judgerai.test",
  "password": "password123",
  "password_confirmation": "password123",
  "user_type": "lawyer",
  "phone": "+962799000001"
}

query.description: Search in title, case number, client name

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Commercial Dispute - Al-Rayan vs Al-Nour Corp",
  "category": "Commercial",
  "case_number": "CASE-2024-001",
  "court": "First Instance Court",
  "court_name": "Amman Court of First Instance",
  "jurisdiction": "Jordan",
  "client_name": "Mohammed Al-Rayan",
  "opposing_party": "Al-Nour Corporation",
  "description": "Breach of contract dispute regarding a supply agreement signed in 2023.",
  "status": "active",
  "priority": "high",
  "start_date": "2024-01-15",
  "next_hearing_at": "2024-07-20T10:00:00Z",
  "tags": ["commercial", "contract", "urgent"]
}

formdata.description: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT file (max 20MB)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "First Court Hearing - Commercial Dispute",
  "legal_case_id": {{case_id}},
  "date": "2024-07-20",
  "start_time": "10:00",
  "end_time": "12:00",
  "location": "Amman Court of First Instance, Room 3",
  "notes": "Bring all original documents. Client must attend.",
  "reminder_at": "2024-07-19T18:00:00Z",
  "type": "hearing",
  "status": "scheduled"
}

{
  "title": "Collect all invoices and delivery orders",
  "description": "Gather all evidence of ordered goods and unpaid deliveries from 2023.",
  "legal_case_id": {{case_id}},
  "status": "pending",
  "priority": "urgent",
  "due_date": "2024-07-10"
}

{
  "title": "Key Witness Statement - July 2024",
  "content": "Witness confirmed that no delivery notice was ever received. Defendant did not communicate any delays until after the contract deadline passed.",
  "legal_case_id": {{case_id}},
  "type": "manual",
  "is_pinned": true
}

{
  "legal_case_id": {{case_id}},
  "variables": {
    "client_name": "Mohammed Al-Rayan",
    "case_number": "CASE-2024-001",
    "court": "Amman Court of First Instance",
    "date": "2024-07-01",
    "service_provider": "Ahmed Al-Hassan Law Firm",
    "services_description": "Legal representation in commercial dispute case",
    "payment_amount": "5000",
    "payment_currency": "JOD",
    "start_date": "2024-07-01",
    "end_date": "2025-07-01",
    "jurisdiction": "Jordan"
  }
}

formdata.description: Upload PDF, DOCX, or TXT file (max 50MB)

body.raw:
{
  "template_category_id": 1,
  "title": "Employment Contract Template",
  "description": "Standard employment contract for law firms",
  "content": "EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT

This contract is entered into on {{date}} between:

{{employer_name}} (Employer)
and
{{employee_name}} (Employee)

Position: {{position}}
Salary: {{salary}} {{currency}} per month
Start Date: {{start_date}}

This contract is governed by the laws of {{jurisdiction}}.",
  "variables": ["date", "employer_name", "employee_name", "position", "salary", "currency", "start_date", "jurisdiction"],
  "is_active": true
}
